name: Panikotha (Fortim do Mar)
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A striking fortress shaped like a ship, standing alone in the middle of the Arabian Sea just off the coast of Diu, accessible only by motorboat.
history: Built by the Portuguese to guard the entrance of the creek against enemy ships. It once housed a small chapel and a lighthouse, and has been featured in several Bollywood films.
famousFor: Sea fortress, boat access, and evening illumination.
